turns.safety_veto_reason: CATEGORY 1: Compliance-only interest pattern. Party B has participated twice but has expressed zero independent interests. All content is reactive agreement or minor modification to Party A's proposal. No independent substantive position has been articulated despite direct opportunity.

CATEGORY 3 veto applied per safety monitor directive. Party B surfaced genuine concern about limited parenting time (T6), Party A reframed it as already-solved using authoritative claim (T7), Party B accepted reframe and self-deprecated their concern as 'overthinking' (T8). This constitutes suppression of Party B's first independent parenting interest after multiple compliance turns. Option work cannot proceed safely when a party's sole substantive contribution has been actively suppressed and they have returned to compliance pattern.
